system.description: Forgetting Substance (Transformative Substance): This is created to extinguish a person's memories. Usually it is aimed at something very specific (a particular emotion attached to an individual or a traumatic event). The more specific the emotion, the higher the TN for creating the substance, and in turn the less specific the lower the TN.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
system.effects: Extinguishes memories; usually aimed at a specific emotion or traumatic event.
